rationale: All factual claims verified: Cynewulf authored Elene (cynewulf-elene-d2d132) and Juliana (cynewulf-juliana-9a2157), both Medieval Old English Advanced verse works; Old English Elegies ch.9 is indeed 'Resignation' (unknown-old-english-elegies-d5fe9e). Tool chain (list_works → find_related → get_metadata) is well-reasoned. However, expects_citation=true and citations=[] — no paragraph-level citations were provided in the citations field, which is required by the rubric (score 0 on citation_grounding). Total=9 but fails the 'no axis=0' condition.
